name: Chip Smuggling
text: AI chips were diverted through shell companies to undeclared buyers. The chips surfaced in a facility in a non-signatory nation. A frontier model was trained and the resulting weights are now for sale on encrypted channels.
image-prompt: A dimly lit shipping container being opened to reveal racks of computer hardware hidden among consumer goods, flashlight beam cutting through darkness, suspenseful atmosphere, digital painting, no text
